title: Fiber optic quench detection for large-scale HTS magnets demonstrated on VIPER cable during high-fidelity testing at the SULTAN facility
note: MIT PSFC/CFS-lineage fiber-optic QD; 2-3x SNR vs voltage taps; co-wound at manufacture.

title: Fiber-Optics Quench Detection Schemes in HTS Cables for Fusion Magnets
note: FBG/ULFBG quench detection architectures for fusion HTS cables — competing modality.

title: Experimental study on quench detection of fiber-optic sensors for high-temperature superconducting model conductors of China's next-generation fusion magnets
note: Chinese fusion program adopting fiber-optic QD in-house (CFETR-class conductors).

title: 星环聚能申请用于超导磁体的失超检测系统及方法专利 (Startorus Fusion files patent for superconducting-magnet quench detection system and method)
note: Chinese fusion startup patenting its own quench detection — buyers build QC as process IP.

title: US11101059B2 — Quench detection in superconducting magnets (assignee: Tokamak Energy Ltd)
note: Tokamak Energy granted patent (HTS tape-strip sensing); expires 2038.

title: THEVA Products — TAPESTAR non-contact critical-current inspection for superconducting tape
note: Incumbent HTS QC instrument at tape level, used by all major tape producers.

title: Hall probes — Lake Shore Cryotronics
note: Incumbent cryogenic Hall sensor/instrument vendor already serving magnet manufacturers.

title: HTS Magnet Factory — Canyon Magnet Energy
note: Example of small HTS magnet factory with in-house winding/qualification — countable TAM.

title: US11749434B2 — Strain- or magnetic field-based quench detection (assignee: Tokamak Energy Ltd)
note: Granted patent covering magnetic-field-based quench detection — direct FTO threat to Hall-array concept.
